violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw chicken in the refrigerator above seafood and beef. The facility corrected on site.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. -Containers in the refrigerator dated 5-24 and 5-28 on 6-9. Need to be discarded.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Employee observed washing hands in a warewash sink. -Observed employee washing hands in the 3 comp sink instead of the handwash sink.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Handwash sink is leaking around the faucet.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Inside of the door going into the kitchen needs repair. Counter out front by the pop dispenser needs repair.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Watched employee change tasks and gloves without washing hands. Handwash sink was actually blocked by a big jug at the beginning of the inspection.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates in the kitchen are not inverted.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Handwash sink in the kitchen leaks around the faucet.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink in the kitchen was blocked at the beginning of the inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Inside of the kitchen door needs repair. Edges of the counters out front need repair.
